title: Huawei USG6600 — NAT source + NAT server with security policy

source.description: Lab topology: trust zone (10.0.0.0/24, 10.0.1.0/24) to untrust with NAT source and NAT server for HTTPS

config.description: Huawei USG with source NAT (PAT via address-group) and destination NAT (static server mapping). Applies zone-based security policy to permit traffic. Source addresses are RFC 1918, public IPs are 198.18.0.0/15 (documentation range).
known_issues: NAT server with protocol tcp must be translated to 'nat static' on Cisco ASA
zone-based security policy maps to Cisco ASA access-group per interface

expected_translation.high_level: Cisco ASA equivalent with object/object-group NAT and access-list
key_lines: access-list trust-to-untrust extended permit ip 10.0.0.0 255.255.255.0 any

verification.notes: High-risk features (nat, security_policy, acl) all present in output
